hvp.name: 🐱‍💻 The challenges of digitalisation
hvp.intro:
Develop your digital competences (knowledge, skills and attitudes) to live, work, learn and thrive in a world increasingly mediated by digital technologies.

https://education.ec.europa.eu/focus-topics/digital-education/action-plan
